description_long: This is a large rectangular box of Sanitarium Weet-Bix, labeled as a 1.2 kg 'Big Family Pack' breakfast cereal. The front of the box prominently displays the Weet-Bix brand in bold white letters on a blue background, with a photo of the cereal served with strawberries and banana slices. The top and sides of the box feature the same yellow and red 'Big Family Pack' banner, while the back provides serving suggestions and additional product information. The left side highlights the product's nutritional benefits, such as being high in fiber and low in sugar, while the right side contains a detailed nutrition facts panel. The box is made of cardboard and is designed to be easily opened from the top.
description: A large, rectangular blue and red Weet-Bix cereal box with bold branding and nutritional information, designed for family-sized servings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Weet-Bix logo, product image with fruit, and key nutritional highlights on a blue and red background.
description_view_1: The left side displays the 'Big Family Pack' banner, Weet-Bix branding, and a focus on grain boosters for study, with a small cereal bowl image.
description_view_2: The back view features serving suggestions, breakfast ideas, and the 'Better Brekkie' campaign, with various food graphics and text.
description_view_3: The right side shows the 'Big Family Pack' banner, Weet-Bix branding, and a detailed nutrition facts panel in a white box.
attribute_brand_logo: The Sanitarium Weet-Bix logo is visible on the front, sides, and back of the box, featuring bold white text on a blue background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front image shows Weet-Bix served with strawberries and bananas, but no explicit flavor is indicated; the product is presented as whole grain cereal.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the right side of the box, including a detailed nutrition facts panel and highlighted benefits such as '97% whole grain', 'high in fiber', and 'low sugar' on the front.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The back of the box features the 'Better Brekkie' campaign with colorful graphics and breakfast ideas, but no mascots or special offers.
